extension.description: Syntax highlighting, auto-completion, execution, and more.
chatParticipant.pharo.description: Create/read classes, evaluate code, and run tests in your Pharo image.
chatParticipant.pharo.command.createPack: Create a Pharo package (input: JSON or text).
Read a class Tonel source (input: class name).
chatParticipant.pharo.command.listPackag: List packages available in the image.
chatParticipant.pharo.command.listClasse: List classes of a package (input: package name).
chatParticipant.pharo.command.eval.descr: Evaluate Smalltalk and return the result (confirmation required).
chatParticipant.pharo.command.runClassTe: Run all tests of a class.
lmTool.createPackage.modelDescription: Creates a package in the Pharo image (has side effects).
lmTool.createClass.modelDescription: Creates a class (Tonel) in a package in the Pharo image (has side effects).
lmTool.readClass.modelDescription: Reads the Tonel source of a class from the Pharo image (no side effects).
lmTool.listPackages.modelDescription: Lists packages present in the Pharo image (no side effects).
lmTool.listClasses.modelDescription: Lists classes of a package in the Pharo image (no side effects).
lmTool.eval.modelDescription: Executes Smalltalk code in the Pharo image and returns the result (may have side effects).
lmTool.runClassTests.modelDescription: Runs all tests of a class in the Pharo image.
lmTool.runTestMethod.modelDescription: Runs a test method (class + selector) in the Pharo image.
configuration.pharo.pathToVM.description: The Pharo VM used to run the Pharo image hosting the Pharo Language Server. Choose a VM compatible with the selected image.
configuration.pharo.pathToImage.descript: The Pharo image that can run the Pharo Language Server (https://github.com/badetitou/Pharo-LanguageServer).
configuration.pharo.imageWorkspace.descr: Expose pharoImage:/ as a workspace folder so extensions supporting virtual workspaces (for example AI assistants) can read classes from the running image.
configuration.pharo.headless.description: Whether the Pharo image should run in headless mode.
configuration.pharo.debugMode.descriptio: Run the image in debug mode (cannot be used in headless mode).
configuration.pharo.quickInstall.imageNa: The image to download by default when using the install command.
configuration.pharo.quickInstall.serverV: The server version to install by default.
The VM version required by default for the selected server.
debuggers.pharodb.launch.program.descrip: Absolute path to a text file.
walkthrough.setup.steps.downloadImage.de: In this step, you have to download the latest Pharo Language Server image from the [GitHub Release page](https://github.com/badetitou/Pharo-LanguageServer/releases)
walkthrough.setup.steps.downloadVM.descr: In this step, you have to download the latest [VM for your Pharo image](https://files.pharo.org/vm/pharo-spur64-headless/)
walkthrough.setup.steps.modifySetting.de:
Update the Pharo settings with the corresponding image and VM paths
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings)
